column9:
=_xlfn.MAP(
  _xlfn.TAKE(_xlfn.ANCHORARRAY(G2),,1),
  _xlfn.LAMBDA(_xlpm.psn,
    _xlfn.LET(
      _xlpm.n, NominalTemp,
      _xlpm.table, _xlfn._xlws.FILTER(SBPOffsets[[nominal_temp]:[offset]], SBPOffsets[probe_serial_number]=_xlpm.psn),
      _xlpm.temps, INDEX(_xlpm.table,,1),
      _xlpm.exact_match, _xlfn.XLOOKUP(_xlpm.n, _xlpm.temps, INDEX(_xlpm.table,,2), NA(), 0),
      IFERROR(
        _xlpm.exact_match,
        _xlfn.LET(
          _xlpm.lo, _xlfn.XLOOKUP(_xlpm.n, _xlpm.temps, _xlpm.table, NA(), -1),
          _xlpm.hi, _xlfn.XLOOKUP(_xlpm.n, _xlpm.temps, _xlpm.table, NA(), 1),
          IF(
            INDEX(_xlpm.lo,1,1)=INDEX(_xlpm.hi,1,1),
            INDEX(_xlpm.lo,1,2),
            _xlfn.FORECAST.LINEAR(
              _xlpm.n,
              INDEX(_xlfn.VSTACK(_xlpm.lo,_xlpm.hi),,2),
              INDEX(_xlfn.VSTACK(_xlpm.lo,_xlpm.hi),,1)
            )
          )
        )
      )
    )
  )
)
